slides.title: Arrays of Arrays
slides.content:
# Nested Arrays

An array can contain other arrays as elements. This creates a multidimensional array.

For example, a list of students, each with their own details:

```php
$students = [
    ["name" => "Alice", "grade" => 85],
    ["name" => "Bob", "grade" => 92],
    ["name" => "Charlie", "grade" => 78]
];
```

Access using multiple indices:

```php
echo $students[0]["name"]; // Alice
echo $students[1]["grade"]; // 92
```

slides.title: Creating and Accessing
slides.content:
```php
<?php
$matrix = [
    [1, 2, 3],
    [4, 5, 6],
    [7, 8, 9]
];

echo $matrix[1][2]; // 6 (second row, third column)

$matrix[2][1] = 0; // modify
echo $matrix[2][1]; // 0
?>
```

quizData.question: Given `$data = [ [1,2], [3,4] ];`, how do you access the value 4?
